negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_045
prompt: A close-up shot captures a stainless steel pot on a stovetop, filled with sautéed vegetables like diced carrots, celery, and onions. A hand holding a glass bottle pours a dark liquid, likely a sauce or broth, into the pot, creating a smooth stream that mixes with the vegetables and generates steam upon contact with the hot surface. The hand continues pouring until the bottle is empty, then uses a wooden spoon to stir the contents, ensuring the liquid is evenly distributed throughout the mixture. The final frame shows the pot now filled with a simmering mixture of vegetables and liquid, with steam rising from the pot, indicating that the cooking process is ongoing.
